task_objective: Fix compare_recency direction issues from review f5f7bbc
design_decisions: Normalized parsed timestamps to aware UTC to prevent naive/aware subtraction errors.
Extracted _timestamp_direction and _parse_iso_timestamp helpers for direct unit testing.
Renamed RECENCY_DIFFERS_TIMEDELTA to RECENCY_TIMESTAMP_MARGIN_SECONDS for clarity.
Added tests for history recording and Zulu-suffix timestamps.
results: All remaining review notes addressed. All tests pass, type checks pass, formatting checks pass. Changes committed atomically.
